task_description: Create a new presentation, add another slide, and insert a screenshot image from the computer.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the Windows taskbar area with a semitransparent red X centered on the blue four-pane Windows Start button, immediately to the left of the search box labeled with Chinese text. In the full screen, this is the Windows 11 desktop with many application and folder icons arranged on the left, a blue abstract wallpaper, and the centered taskbar at the bottom; the target is a toolbar control in the taskbar.
caption.action: Click the Windows Start button on the taskbar.
caption.expectation: The Start menu should open above the taskbar, showing pinned apps, recent items, and search options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the pinned-apps area of the Windows Start menu with a semitransparent red X centered on the orange PowerPoint tile, which has a white letter P on an orange document-and-circle icon and the label PowerPoint beneath it. Nearby are Excel, Mail, Calculator, Clock, and Notepad tiles. In the full-screen view, the Windows 11 desktop is visible with the Start menu open in the center, a search box at the top, pinned apps and recommended items in the main panel, and a Phone Link panel on the right showing young's iPhone.
caption.action: Click the PowerPoint app tile in the Start menu.
caption.expectation: The PowerPoint tile should be selected and Microsoft PowerPoint should begin launching in a new window.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the PowerPoint start screen's template gallery with a semitransparent red X centered on the large white thumbnail labeled “空白演示文稿” (Blank Presentation). This is a clickable template tile, not the slide canvas. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open on the desktop with the left sidebar on “新建” (New), several template thumbnails across the top row, and a recent files list below; the selected target is the first blank presentation template tile.
caption.action: Click the “空白演示文稿” (Blank Presentation) template tile.
caption.expectation: The template tile should be selected and PowerPoint should open a new blank presentation in the editing workspace.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a small floating context menu next to the slide thumbnail pane, with a semitransparent red X centered on the left side of the menu near the clipboard-style icon under the heading “粘贴选项:” (Paste Options). Below are options including “新建幻灯片(N)” (New Slide) and “新章节(A)” (New Section). This indicates the right-click occurred in the left thumbnail/navigation area on a blank region or slide-pane area, opening a context menu with paste and slide-management actions rather than object-editing controls. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open with one blank title slide, the left sidebar showing a single slide thumbnail, the main canvas showing title and subtitle placeholders, and the context menu floating beside the thumbnail pane.
caption.action: Right-click in the left slide thumbnail pane area to open the context menu.
caption.expectation: A context menu should appear with paste-related options and slide actions such as creating a new slide or a new section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a small PowerPoint context menu in the slide thumbnail pane, and the semitransparent red X is centered on the menu item labeled “新建幻灯片(N)” (New Slide) with a slide thumbnail icon. This is a UI control in a context menu, not the canvas. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open with one title slide visible on the main canvas, the left sidebar contains the single slide thumbnail, and the same context menu is open beside that thumbnail area.
caption.action: Click the “新建幻灯片(N)” (New Slide) menu item in the context menu.
caption.expectation: The context menu should close and a new slide should be inserted into the presentation, adding another slide thumbnail in the left pane.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the PowerPoint ribbon with a semitransparent red X centered on the “插入” tab, which is a top toolbar tab between “开始” and “设计.” This is a UI control in the top area, not an object on the slide canvas. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open with two slide thumbnails on the left, the second slide selected, and a title-and-content slide visible in the main editing area; the ribbon is currently on the Home tab and the click targets the Insert tab.
caption.action: Click the “插入” (Insert) tab on the ribbon.
caption.expectation: The ribbon should switch to the Insert tab, showing insert-related tools and options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the PowerPoint Insert ribbon, with a semitransparent red X centered on the large button labeled “图片” (Pictures). The button has a small landscape icon showing mountains and a sun inside a rectangular frame, and it sits in the “图像” (Images) group next to options like “屏幕截图” and “相册.” This is a toolbar UI control in the top ribbon area. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open with the second slide selected in the left thumbnail pane, the slide uses a title-and-content layout, and the Insert tab is active on the ribbon.
caption.action: Click the “图片” (Pictures) button on the Insert ribbon.
caption.expectation: A picture insertion menu or file selection dialog should open, allowing an image to be chosen for insertion into the slide.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the PowerPoint Insert ribbon with the Pictures dropdown menu open under the large “图片” button. A semitransparent red X is centered on the first menu item labeled “此设备(D)...”, which has a small picture-and-monitor style icon. Above it is the section header “插入图片来自”, and below are other options including “图像集(S)...” and “联机图片(O)...”. In the full-screen view, PowerPoint is open on the Windows desktop with slide 2 selected in the left thumbnail pane, a title-and-content slide visible on the canvas, and the Insert tab active.
caption.action: Click the “此设备(D)...” option in the Pictures dropdown menu.
caption.expectation: The dropdown menu should close and a file picker dialog should open so an image can be chosen from the device.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a Windows file picker with a semitransparent red X centered on a selected item labeled “屏幕截图.” The item appears as a yellow folder icon with a preview thumbnail overlay showing part of a chart or equation image, and it has a blue selection highlight, indicating it is a folder rather than a single image file. In the full-screen view, the “插入图片” dialog is open over PowerPoint, currently inside the Pictures library. Several folders and image files are visible in the main pane, the filename field at the bottom is empty, and PowerPoint remains open behind the dialog on slide 2.
caption.action: Double-click the selected “屏幕截图” folder in the file picker.
caption.expectation: The file picker should open that folder and display its contents so an image inside it can be selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a file thumbnail in the open file picker with a semitransparent red X centered on the first image item labeled “屏幕截图 2025-03-01 154046.png.” The thumbnail preview shows a light-colored screenshot with small diagram-like figures, and the item is already highlighted with a light blue selection background. In the full-screen view, the “插入图片” dialog is open inside the “图片 > 屏幕截图” folder over PowerPoint, multiple PNG screenshot files are visible, and the selected image is in the top-left of the file list while slide 2 remains visible behind the dialog.
caption.action: Click the selected image file “屏幕截图 2025-03-01 154046.png” in the file picker.
caption.expectation: The image file remains selected in the dialog, preparing it to be inserted when the Open button is used or if it is double-clicked next.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the bottom-right area of the Windows file picker, with a semitransparent red X centered on the blue button labeled “插入(S)” next to its small dropdown arrow. Nearby are the file type dropdown showing image formats and a gray “取消” button. In the full-screen view, the “插入图片” dialog is open over PowerPoint, the folder path is 图片 > 屏幕截图, and the first screenshot file is selected in the thumbnail grid with its name filled into the filename field, indicating the dialog is ready to insert that chosen image.
caption.action: Click the blue “插入(S)” button in the file picker.
caption.expectation: The file picker should close and the selected screenshot image should be inserted onto the current PowerPoint slide.
